description: Buffer.concat static method dispatches to the Buffer shim instead of colliding with the array/string .concat method hoisting. The `Buffer` identifier receiver infers as unknown and `concat` is in HOISTED_AMBIGUOUS_ARR_STR/HOISTED_STRING_METHODS, so it was mis-routed to String.concat and returned an empty buffer; now it falls through to the generic object-method path like Buffer.from/alloc.
